📝 Word Counter

Count words, characters, sentences and paragraphs in any text instantly.

Start typing to see the word count

Common word count references

Document type Typical word count
Tweet / X postup to 280 characters
Blog post (short)300–600 words
Blog post (standard)1,000–1,500 words
University essay1,500–3,000 words
Short story1,000–7,500 words
Novel70,000–100,000 words

What is a word counter?

A word counter is a tool that counts the number of words, characters, sentences and paragraphs in a piece of text. It is useful for writers, students, journalists and anyone who needs to meet a specific word count limit or target.

Frequently asked questions

How many words are on a standard page?

A standard A4 page with 12pt Times New Roman font contains approximately 250–300 words double-spaced, or 500–600 words single-spaced.

How long does it take to read X words?

The average adult reads approximately 200–250 words per minute. This calculator shows an estimated reading time based on 200 words per minute.

Does it count hyphenated words as one or two?

Hyphenated words (e.g. well-being) are counted as one word, which is the standard convention in most style guides.
